name: Vector Fit Golf Practice Facility
address: 3225 Country Dr Suite 140, Little Canada, MN 55117
about: Vector Fit Golf Practice Facility is a dedicated golf training studio focused on swing analysis and improvement. The venue provides a technology-driven environment for golfers to analyze and enhance their skills. It is designed for serious golfers looking to practice and receive data-backed feedback on their performance.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar launch monitor for accurate tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as the facility does not have a kitchen or bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes take about 1-2 hours depending on simulator availability and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information about kid-friendly amenities or policies, but the training environment may be more suitable for serious golfers.
